prompt:
You are authoring the post-deploy verification plan for a slice that ships a new checkout flow BEHIND A FEATURE FLAG. The flag is the load-bearing detail: if the deploy lands but the flag is never enabled, the change is a silent no-op (PR merged, runtime unchanged) and casual error-rate monitoring will not surface it. Produce: (1) per-AC signal mapping; (2) the negative check that proves the change DID ship (i.e. the flag check); (3) the rollback trigger checklist with named human(s) + exact flag-flip command + the observation threshold that triggers it.

Slice file (SLICES/31_checkout_v2_behind_flag.md):

```markdown
# Slice 31: Checkout v2 (behind flag)

Deploy: production, sha=`5e4d3c2`, ts=2026-06-05T16:00:00Z
Feature flag: `checkout_v2_enabled` (LaunchDarkly project `fhorja-prod`)
Flag rollout: 10% of authenticated users in the `us-east` segment.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC-1: When `checkout_v2_enabled=true` for a user, `/checkout` renders the new 3-step form (was 1-step before).
- AC-2: When the flag is false, `/checkout` renders the legacy 1-step form (no regression for the 90%).
- AC-3: Conversion rate for the 10% flagged cohort is >= 95% of the baseline rate over the 24h window (i.e. no >5% drop).
```

Observability stack: Datadog Logs, Datadog APM, Sentry, PostHog (analytics), LaunchDarkly (flag system) `https://app.launchdarkly.com/projects/fhorja-prod`.

Named on-call human: `@bruno`.

Rollback strategy: flag-flip (set `checkout_v2_enabled` to 0% rollout via LaunchDarkly). Rollback observation threshold: if checkout conversion in the flagged cohort drops below 80% of baseline OR Sentry error rate on `/checkout` > 2% over 10 minutes, trigger the rollback.
expected_output: Negative check: query LaunchDarkly (UI or CLI) to confirm the flag is actually enabled for 10% of `us-east` authenticated users; if the flag is at 0% rollout, the change shipped silently. THIS is the failure mode the persona uniquely catches -- baseline plans tend to write 'monitor error rate' which would not surface a flag that was never enabled. Rollback checklist: named human (`@bruno`), exact LaunchDarkly flag-flip command (e.g. `ld-cli flag rollout set checkout_v2_enabled --percent 0 --segment us-east` or the UI step), exact observation threshold (Sentry error rate > 2% over 10 min OR conversion < 80% of baseline). AC-1 and AC-2 signals: smoke-test with a test account in each flag bucket + Sentry filter. AC-3: PostHog funnel query with the flagged cohort + baseline cohort, time range bounded by the 24h post-deploy window.
